ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Lime, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: Coconut milk 42%, water 36.5%, oyster mushroom 4%, lemon grass 3.7%, galangal 3%, sugar 2.5%, straw mushroom 2.5%, salt 2% fish sauce (anchovy fish, salt sugar) 1.3%, lime juice 1%, coriander 0.5%, fresh red chilies 0.5%, kaffir lime leaves 0.3%, citric acid (e330) 0.2%
